hero.subtitle: Freelance designer & developer on the French Riviera. I build custom websites for creators and businesses that want to stand out, grow their traffic, and leave a lasting impression — on Google and in AI answers.

about.item1.title: Creative freelance developer, I carry your project from concept to code.
about.item1.desc: I'm Anthony. Based on the French Riviera, I design and build custom websites for brands, creators and businesses that want a web experience worth remembering.
about.svc1.title: Art Direction & Design
about.svc1.desc: A strong visual identity and an experience that gets noticed. I craft your brand's image, not just a pretty layout — every detail builds your credibility.
about.svc2.title: Custom Web Development
about.svc2.desc: Sites designed and hand-coded, no templates. Fast, polished, animated — built for your brand, and no one else's.
about.svc3.title: Technical SEO & GEO
about.svc3.desc: Get found on Google and cited by AI (ChatGPT, Gemini). A site that isn't just beautiful, but visible where your customers actually search today.

about2.body.lead: You'll have gathered it by now: I craft web experiences that leave a mark and last. The next move is yours — let's talk about your project.

services.item1.title: Design
services.item1.body: Editorial art direction, brand systems, design tokens. An identity crafted for your brand — usable across web, print and social. Not a bought theme, not a recycled template. A signature that holds for 10 years, not 10 months.
services.item2.title: Digital Experience
services.item2.body: Astro, React, Lighthouse ≥ 95. Fast, accessible, performant sites — with no visual compromise. Core Web Vitals all green. An interface that loads before competitors finish their hero. Architecture built to last.
services.item3.title: SEO + GEO
services.item3.body: Technical audit, content cluster, Schema.org, llms.txt. Classic SEO for Google + optimization for generative engines: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews. Indexed, structured to be cited — not just listed.

projects.count.label: Cases
projects.project1.title: Surly
projects.project1.headline: Banking & insurance marketplace
projects.project1.problem: Banking & insurance marketplace — specialized sourcing generalist platforms can't filter.
projects.project1.summary: Co-founded and shipped end-to-end: React + Supabase, two-sided marketplace, hands-on growth.
projects.project1.subtitle: Co-founder & CTO · React · Supabase · Growth · Still shipping
projects.project1.context.label: Context
projects.project1.context: Surly is my most invested project — not a client, a product I co-founded and have been running technically for four years. It's a marketplace specialized in banking and insurance: it connects experienced freelance consultants with industry players for short, mid and long-term assignments.
projects.project1.challenge.label: The challenge
projects.project1.challenge: Banking and insurance are regulated, demanding worlds where deep expertise and experience are non-negotiable. Generalist platforms can't filter that bar: they drown rare profiles in the crowd. Surly fills that gap with a qualified, dedicated pool — a true talent marketplace for organizations that can't settle for almost-right.
projects.project1.role.label: My role
projects.project1.role: Co-founder and CTO. I built the platform end-to-end: architecture, full-stack development, and to this day maintenance and growth hacking. From the first line of code to ongoing growth, the product stays in my hands.
projects.project1.approach.label: Approach
projects.project1.approach: A two-sided marketplace built on React and Supabase — light enough to iterate fast, robust enough to handle the load and the trust of institutional players. On the supply side, demanding sourcing of vetted consultants; on the demand side, an experience designed for companies to find the right profile without friction. Four years in, I'm still evolving the product and pulling the growth levers myself.
projects.project1.result.label: Outcome
projects.project1.result: 1,600 specialized consultants listed. 8 enterprise clients using Surly as their talent marketplace for short and long-term assignments. And a platform still active after four years — proof that a niche product, well built and well maintained, lasts.
projects.project2.title: Vaulk
projects.project2.headline: CBRN-hardened shelters, made in France
projects.project2.problem: Make desirable an object whose reason to exist is a threat — without ever turning anxiogenic.
projects.project2.summary: Editorial, cinematic site for a designer of high-performance civil protection shelters.
projects.project2.subtitle: Web Design · Development · 3D Integration · 2026
projects.project2.context.label: Context
projects.project2.context: Vaulk designs modular CBRN-hardened shelters — high-performance civil protection, manufactured in France and deployable in seven days. A promise both technical and grave, addressed equally to states and critical sites as to discerning private owners. The site had to carry that level of seriousness without ever turning anxiogenic: inspire trust, not fear.
projects.project2.challenge.label: The challenge
projects.project2.challenge: How do you make desirable an object whose reason to exist is a threat? Translate dry notions — UHPC, ballistic performance, CBRN filtration, ISO compliance — into an experience that breathes mastery and high-end craft. The luxury of peace of mind, in essence.
projects.project2.role.label: My role
projects.project2.role: Developer and designer of the site, as subcontractor. I took on the full build of the experience: front-end development on Next.js, content integration through Strapi, and orchestration of the 3D and video sequences provided by the client — scroll-driven editing, rhythm, motion — so they would serve the narrative rather than decorate it. Three months of work.
projects.project2.approach.label: Approach
projects.project2.approach: An editorial, cinematic stance. The 3D and video sequences reveal the shelter in layers — UHPC structure, blast door, modular system, filtration — the way you unveil a piece of precision machinery. A narrative thread that turns technical data into demonstration: the protection matrix, the five use cases, the D-day → D+7 logistics chain. Every section is timed so a decision-maker grasps it in seconds, and a private buyer feels the seriousness. The entire integration aimed at one goal: that perceived quality match the actual quality of the product.
projects.project2.result.label: Outcome
projects.project2.result: A sharp brand upgrade. Vaulk now has a site worthy of its product — premium, controlled, credible to a clientele that tolerates no approximation. Shipped in three months.
projects.project3.title: Sun Beach House
projects.project3.headline: The art of Saint Barth living, online
projects.project3.problem: St Barth's luxury market saturated with the same vocabulary — translate a human, discreet promise into something lastingly visible.
projects.project3.summary: Identity, editorial site and ongoing visibility for an independent luxury villa agency in Saint Barthélemy.
projects.project3.subtitle: Brand identity · Web Design · Development · SEO/GEO · Ongoing engagement
projects.project3.context.label: Context
projects.project3.context: Sun Beach House is Valérie Kerckhofs's independent agency, based in Saint Barthélemy since 1996: seasonal rental and sale of prestige villas, bespoke concierge service, and certain properties deliberately kept off-line to preserve their owners' discretion. A boutique house where you speak to a single contact — not a file number.
projects.project3.challenge.label: The challenge
projects.project3.challenge: Translate online a deeply human and discreet promise, in a market — St Barth luxury — where everyone reaches for the same "exceptional villa" vocabulary. The site had to stand out by tone and refinement, respect the portfolio's confidentiality, and stay durably visible to an international, high-net-worth clientele.
projects.project3.role.label: My role
projects.project3.role: The full project, from image to visibility. Brand identity redesign, conception and development of an editorial site on Next.js, back-office on Sanity Studio so the agency can manage its villas and magazine in full autonomy, and an ongoing SEO and GEO program. The relationship is still active today.
projects.project3.approach.label: Approach
projects.project3.approach: Tell the island, don't list properties. The site reads like a day in Saint Barth — "The Island's Rhythm", from morning yoga facing the bay to golden hour over Gustavia — carried by video sequences that set the atmosphere before villas are even mentioned. French elegance as the throughline: refined typography, breathing room, photography that lets the place speak. Behind the scenes, Sanity gives Valérie complete autonomy without touching code. And because an invisible showcase is worth nothing, I set up a lasting visibility program: classic SEO and optimization for generative engines, so the brand surfaces on Google as well as in AI answers.
projects.project3.result.label: Outcome
projects.project3.result: A brand whose image finally matches the service: editorial, sensorial, distinctive. A content-autonomous site, and visibility built month after month. [Numbers to add once available: traffic, queries won, inbound enquiries.] An ongoing collaboration — the best indicator of satisfaction.
projects.project3.stack: Next.js · Sanity Studio · Mux video · ongoing SEO/GEO
projects.project3.role_meta: Brand, design, dev, SEO/GEO — ongoing engagement
projects.project4.title: Royal Yacht International
projects.project4.headline: Superyacht broker, Monaco
projects.project4.problem: The site precedes a multi-million dollar dossier — it has to embody the firm's standing instantly.
projects.project4.summary: Brand redesign and custom site for a Monaco-based luxury charter broker.
projects.project4.subtitle: Brand identity · Web Design · WordPress development · SEO
projects.project4.context.label: Context
projects.project4.context: Royal Yacht International, based in Monaco, operates in superyacht charter, sales, management and construction, with relays from London to Dubai and Miami. A clientele among the wealthiest in the world, in a sector where image is the first handshake.
projects.project4.challenge.label: The challenge
projects.project4.challenge: The site often precedes a multi-million dollar dossier. It had to embody the firm's standing without delay — elegance, credibility, discretion — and carry an international brand where its clientele goes looking for it.
projects.project4.role.label: My role
projects.project4.role: Full redesign: new brand identity, conception and WordPress development, and SEO to anchor the brand on its strategic queries. From logo to SEO, a single hand for coherence.
projects.project4.approach.label: Approach
projects.project4.approach: Rebuild the image around luxury codes — restraint, photography that lets the yachts breathe, controlled hierarchy. A polished WordPress for the client's autonomy on fleet and content, with no compromise on the rendering. An SEO foundation built for an international audience.
projects.project4.result.label: Outcome
projects.project4.result: [To complete: visibility, perceived image, queries won.] A digital presence finally aligned with the level of the fleet.
projects.project4.role_meta: Brand, design, WordPress dev, SEO — full redesign
projects.project5.title: Eden Rock Yacht Rental
projects.project5.headline: Yachting signed Eden Rock, St Barths
projects.project5.client: Eden Rock Yacht Rental · St Barths
projects.project5.problem: Extend an iconic hospitality brand into a new service without diluting its aura.
projects.project5.summary: Identity and site for the yacht rental service of a legendary Caribbean house.
projects.project5.subtitle: Brand identity · Web Design · WordPress development · SEO
projects.project5.context.label: Context
projects.project5.context: Eden Rock – St Barths is a hospitality legend since 1953 — the barefoot elegance of St Jean Bay, historic refuge of an exceptional clientele. Eden Rock Yacht Rental extends that hospitality at sea: bespoke private cruises, from the Caribbean to the Mediterranean, in partnership with Royal Yacht International.
projects.project5.challenge.label: The challenge
projects.project5.challenge: Extend an iconic brand into a new service without diluting its aura. The site had to be worthy of the Eden Rock name — chic, timeless, intimate — while clearly laying out the yachting promise and its single point of contact.
projects.project5.role.label: My role
projects.project5.role: Brand identity redesign, conception and WordPress development of the site, and SEO. Bringing a heritage to life online while launching a new offering.
projects.project5.approach.label: Approach
projects.project5.approach: Capture the Eden Rock spirit — relaxed luxury, Caribbean refinement — and translate it into a web experience that makes you want to cast off. Atmospheric photography, editorial tone, a simple path to contact. WordPress for autonomy, SEO to reach an international high-end clientele.
projects.project5.result.label: Outcome
projects.project5.result: [To complete: launch, visibility, feedback.] A credible brand extension, worthy of the heritage.
projects.project5.role_meta: Brand, design, WordPress dev, SEO — brand extension
